001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.SystemUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
023
024import java.io.*;
025import java.util.*;
026import java.util.concurrent.*;
027
028import javax.xml.stream.*;
029import javax.xml.stream.util.*;
030
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
037
038/**
039 * Parses text generated by the {@link XmlSerializer} class back into a POJO model.
040 *
041 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
042 * <p>
043 * Handles <c>Content-Type</c> types:  <bc>text/xml</bc>
044 *
045 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
046 * <p>
047 * See the {@link XmlSerializer} class for a description of Juneau-generated XML.
048 *
049 * <h5 class='figure'>Example input (Map of name/age):</h5>
050 * <p class='bxml'>
051 *    <xt>&lt;object&gt;</xt>
052 *       <xt>&lt;name&gt;</xt>Alice<xt>&lt;/name&gt;</xt>
053 *       <xt>&lt;age&gt;</xt>30<xt>&lt;/age&gt;</xt>
054 *    <xt>&lt;/object&gt;</xt>
055 * </p>
056 *
057 * <h5 class='figure'>Complex (nested object + array):</h5>
058 * <p class='bxml'>
059 *    <xt>&lt;object&gt;</xt>
060 *       <xt>&lt;name&gt;</xt>Alice<xt>&lt;/name&gt;</xt>
061 *       <xt>&lt;age&gt;</xt>30<xt>&lt;/age&gt;</xt>
062 *       <xt>&lt;address&gt;</xt>
063 *          <xt>&lt;street&gt;</xt>123 Main St<xt>&lt;/street&gt;</xt>
064 *          <xt>&lt;city&gt;</xt>Boston<xt>&lt;/city&gt;</xt>
065 *          <xt>&lt;state&gt;</xt>MA<xt>&lt;/state&gt;</xt>
066 *       <xt>&lt;/address&gt;</xt>
067 *       <xt>&lt;tags&gt;</xt>
068 *          <xt>&lt;string&gt;</xt>a<xt>&lt;/string&gt;</xt>
069 *          <xt>&lt;string&gt;</xt>b<xt>&lt;/string&gt;</xt>
070 *          <xt>&lt;string&gt;</xt>c<xt>&lt;/string&gt;</xt>
071 *       <xt>&lt;/tags&gt;</xt>
072 *    <xt>&lt;/object&gt;</xt>
073 * </p>
074 *
075 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
076 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
077 * </ul>
078 *
079 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
080 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/XmlSupport">XML Basics</a>
081
082 * </ul>
083 */
084@SuppressWarnings({
085   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
086   "resource" // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's parser session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
087})
088public class XmlParser extends ReaderParser implements XmlMetaProvider, RecordReadable, ArrayRecordReadable {
089
090   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
091   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
092
093   // Property name constants
094   private static final String PROP_eventAllocator = "eventAllocator";
095   private static final String PROP_preserveRootElement = "preserveRootElement";
096   private static final String PROP_reporter = "reporter";
097   private static final String PROP_resolver = "resolver";
098   private static final String PROP_validating = "validating";
099
100   /**
101    * Builder class.
102    */
103   @SuppressWarnings({
104      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
105   })
106   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends ReaderParser.Builder<SELF> {
107
108      private static final Cache<HashKey,XmlParser> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, XmlParser.class).build();
109
110      private boolean preserveRootElement;
111      private boolean validating;
112      private Class<? extends XMLEventAllocator> eventAllocator;
113      private Class<? extends XMLReporter> reporter;
114      private Class<? extends XMLResolver> resolver;
115
116      /**
117       * Constructor, default settings.
118       */
119      protected Builder() {
120         consumes("text/xml,application/xml");
121         preserveRootElement = env("XmlParser.preserveRootElement", false);
122         validating = env("XmlParser.validating", false);
123         eventAllocator = null;
124         reporter = null;
125         resolver = null;
126      }
127
128      /**
129       * Copy constructor.
130       *
131       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
132       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
133       */
134      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
135         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
136         preserveRootElement = copyFrom.preserveRootElement;
137         validating = copyFrom.validating;
138         eventAllocator = copyFrom.eventAllocator;
139         reporter = copyFrom.reporter;
140         resolver = copyFrom.resolver;
141      }
142
143      /**
144       * Copy constructor.
145       *
146       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
147       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
148       */
149      protected Builder(XmlParser copyFrom) {
150         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
151         preserveRootElement = copyFrom.preserveRootElement;
152         validating = copyFrom.validating;
153         eventAllocator = copyFrom.eventAllocator;
154         reporter = copyFrom.reporter;
155         resolver = copyFrom.resolver;
156      }
157
158      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
159      public XmlParser build() {
160         return cache(CACHE).build(XmlParser.class);
161      }
162
163      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
164      public abstract SELF copy();
165
166      /**
167       * XML event allocator.
168       *
169       * <p>
170       * Associates an {@link XMLEventAllocator} with this parser.
171       *
172       * @param value The new value for this property.
173       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (no event allocator will be used).
174       * @return This object.
175       */
176      public SELF eventAllocator(Class<? extends XMLEventAllocator> value) {
177         eventAllocator = value;
178         return self();
179      }
180
181      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
182      public HashKey hashKey() {
183         // @formatter:off
184         return HashKey.of(
185            super.hashKey(),
186            preserveRootElement,
187            validating,
188            eventAllocator,
189            reporter,
190            resolver
191         );
192         // @formatter:on
193      }
194
195      /**
196       * Preserve root element during generalized parsing.
197       *
198       * <p>
199       * When enabled, when parsing into a generic {@link JsonMap}, the map will contain a single entry whose key
200       * is the root element name.
201       *
202       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
203       * <p class='bjava'>
204       *    <jc>// Parser with preserve-root-element.</jc>
205       *    ReaderParser <jv>parser1</jv> = XmlParser
206       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
207       *       .preserveRootElement()
208       *       .build();
209       *
210       *    <jc>// Parser without preserve-root-element (the default behavior).</jc>
211       *    ReaderParser <jv>parser2</jv> = XmlParser
212       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
213       *       .build();
214       *
215       *    String <jv>xml</jv> = <js>"&lt;root&gt;&lt;a&gt;foobar&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/root&gt;"</js>;
216       *
217       *    <jc>// Produces:  "{ root: { a:'foobar' }}"</jc>
218       *    JsonMap <jv>map1</jv> = <jv>parser1</jv>.parse(<jv>xml</jv>, JsonMap.<jk>class</jk>);
219       *
220       *    <jc>// Produces:  "{ a:'foobar' }"</jc>
221       *    JsonMap <jv>map2</jv> = <jv>parser2</jv>.parse(<jv>xml</jv>, JsonMap.<jk>class</jk>);
222       * </p>
223       *
224       * @return This object.
225       */
226      public SELF preserveRootElement() {
227         return preserveRootElement(true);
228      }
229
230      /**
231       * Same as {@link #preserveRootElement()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
232       *
233       * @param value The value for this setting.
234       * @return This object.
235       */
236      public SELF preserveRootElement(boolean value) {
237         preserveRootElement = value;
238         return self();
239      }
240
241      /**
242       * XML reporter.
243       *
244       * <p>
245       * Associates an {@link XMLReporter} with this parser.
246       *
247       * @param value The new value for this property.
248       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (no reporter will be used).
249       * @return This object.
250       */
251      public SELF reporter(Class<? extends XMLReporter> value) {
252         reporter = value;
253         return self();
254      }
255
256      /**
257       * XML resolver.
258       *
259       * <p>
260       * Associates an {@link XMLResolver} with this parser.
261       *
262       * @param value The new value for this property.
263       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (no resolver will be used).
264       * @return This object.
265       */
266      public SELF resolver(Class<? extends XMLResolver> value) {
267         resolver = value;
268         return self();
269      }
270
271
272      /**
273       * Enable validation.
274       *
275       * <p>
276       * If <jk>true</jk>, XML document will be validated.
277       *
278       * <p>
279       * See {@link XMLInputFactory#IS_VALIDATING} for more info.
280       *
281       * @return This object.
282       */
283      public SELF validating() {
284         return validating(true);
285      }
286
287      /**
288       * Same as {@link #validating()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
289       *
290       * @param value The value for this setting.
291       * @return This object.
292       */
293      public SELF validating(boolean value) {
294         validating = value;
295         return self();
296      }
297   }
298
299   /**
300    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link XmlParser#create()} / {@link XmlParser#copy()} path.
301    */
302   @SuppressWarnings({
303      "java:S110" // Inheritance depth follows the parser builder chain; intentional layered design
304   })
305   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
306
307      DefaultBuilder() {}
308
309      DefaultBuilder(XmlParser copyFrom) {
310         super(copyFrom);
311      }
312
313      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
314         super(copyFrom);
315      }
316
317      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
318      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
319         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
320      }
321   }
322
323   /** Default parser, all default settings.*/
324   public static final XmlParser DEFAULT = new XmlParser(create());
325
326   /**
327    * Creates a new builder for this object.
328    *
329    * @return A new builder.
330    */
331   @SuppressWarnings({
332      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
333   })
334   public static Builder<?> create() {
335      return new DefaultBuilder();
336   }
337
338   protected final boolean preserveRootElement;
339   protected final boolean validating;
340   protected final Class<? extends XMLEventAllocator> eventAllocator;
341   protected final Class<? extends XMLReporter> reporter;
342   protected final Class<? extends XMLResolver> resolver;
343
344   private final XMLEventAllocator eventAllocatorImpl;
345   private final XMLReporter reporterImpl;
346   private final XMLResolver resolverImpl;
347   private final Map<BeanMeta<?>,XmlBeanMeta> xmlBeanMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
348   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,XmlBeanPropertyMeta> xmlBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
349   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,XmlClassMeta> xmlClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
350
351   /**
352    * Constructor.
353    *
354    * @param builder
355    *    The property store containing all the settings for this object.
356    */
357   public XmlParser(Builder<?> builder) {
358      super(builder);
359      eventAllocator = builder.eventAllocator;
360      preserveRootElement = builder.preserveRootElement;
361      reporter = builder.reporter;
362      resolver = builder.resolver;
363      validating = builder.validating;
364
365      reporterImpl = nn(reporter) ? newInstance(reporter) : null;
366      resolverImpl = nn(resolver) ? newInstance(resolver) : null;
367      eventAllocatorImpl = nn(eventAllocator) ? newInstance(eventAllocator) : null;
368   }
369
370   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
371   public Builder<?> copy() {
372      return new DefaultBuilder(this);
373   }
374
375   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
376   public XmlParserSession.Builder<?> createSession() {
377      return XmlParserSession.create(this);
378   }
379
380   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
381   public XmlParserSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
382
383   /**
384    * Convenience delegator for the whole-value {@link RecordReader} using <b>default session
385    * arguments</b>.  The real implementation lives on {@link XmlParserSession#parseRecords(Object)}.
386    *
387    * @param input The input.
388    * @return A new {@link RecordReader} cursor.
389    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
390    */
391   @Override /* RecordReadable */
392   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
393      return getSession().parseRecords(input);
394   }
395
396   /**
397    * Convenience delegator for the buffered array-element {@link RecordReader} using <b>default
398    * session arguments</b>.  The real implementation lives on
399    * {@link XmlParserSession#parseArrayRecords(Object)}.
400    *
401    * @param input The input.
402    * @return A buffered {@link RecordReader}.
403    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred reading the input.
404    */
405   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
406   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
407      return getSession().parseArrayRecords(input);
408   }
409
410   /**
411    * Convenience delegator for the buffered array-element {@link RecordReader} with a
412    * caller-specified root element name, using <b>default session arguments</b>.  The real
413    * implementation lives on {@link XmlParserSession#parseArrayRecords(Object, String)}.
414    *
415    * @param input The input.
416    * @param rootElementName The expected root element wrapping the array.
417    * @return A buffered {@link RecordReader}.
418    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred reading the input.
419    */
420   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
421   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input, String rootElementName) throws IOException {
422      return getSession().parseArrayRecords(input, rootElementName);
423   }
424
425   /**
426    * The XML record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
427    *
428    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
429    */
430   @Override /* RecordReadable */
431   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
432
433   /**
434    * The XML array-record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
435    *
436    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
437    */
438   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
439   public boolean isArrayRecordStreaming() { return false; }
440
441   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
442   public XmlBeanMeta getXmlBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
443      return xmlBeanMetas.computeIfAbsent(bm, k -> new XmlBeanMeta(k, this));
444   }
445
446   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
447   public XmlBeanPropertyMeta getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
448      return xmlBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new XmlBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
449   }
450
451   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
452   public XmlClassMeta getXmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
453      return xmlClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new XmlClassMeta(k, this));
454   }
455
456   private static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> c) {
457      try {
458         return c.getDeclaredConstructor().newInstance();
459      } catch (Exception e) {
460         throw toRex(e);
461      }
462   }
463
464   /**
465    * XML event allocator.
466    *
467    * @see Builder#eventAllocator(Class)
468    * @return
469    *    The {@link XMLEventAllocator} associated with this parser, or <jk>null</jk> if there isn't one.
470    */
471   protected final XMLEventAllocator getEventAllocator() { return eventAllocatorImpl; }
472
473   /**
474    * XML reporter.
475    *
476    * @see Builder#reporter(Class)
477    * @return
478    *    The {@link XMLReporter} associated with this parser, or <jk>null</jk> if there isn't one.
479    */
480   protected final XMLReporter getReporter() { return reporterImpl; }
481
482   /**
483    * XML resolver.
484    *
485    * @see Builder#resolver(Class)
486    * @return
487    *    The {@link XMLResolver} associated with this parser, or <jk>null</jk> if there isn't one.
488    */
489   protected final XMLResolver getResolver() { return resolverImpl; }
490
491   /**
492    * Preserve root element during generalized parsing.
493    *
494    * @see Builder#preserveRootElement()
495    * @return
496    *    <jk>true</jk> if when parsing into a generic {@link JsonMap}, the map will contain a single entry whose key
497    *    is the root element name.
498    */
499   protected final boolean isPreserveRootElement() { return preserveRootElement; }
500
501   /**
502    * Enable validation.
503    *
504    * @see Builder#validating()
505    * @return
506    *    <jk>true</jk> if XML document will be validated.
507    */
508   protected final boolean isValidating() { return validating; }
509
510   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParser */
511   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
512      return super.properties()
513         .a(PROP_eventAllocator, eventAllocator)
514         .a(PROP_preserveRootElement, preserveRootElement)
515         .a(PROP_reporter, reporter)
516         .a(PROP_resolver, resolver)
517         .a(PROP_validating, validating);
518   }
519}
